PropertyTypes.Caption: Default image
PropertyTypes.Description: This is the image that is displayed if no image is uploaded.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Image URL
PropertyTypes.Description: The link of the external image.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Background image
PropertyTypes.Description: Whether the image is rendered as a background. More content can be put inside, while design properties will have no effect.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Alternative text
PropertyTypes.Description: Alternative text of the image for accessibility purposes.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Height unit
PropertyTypes.Description: Auto will keep the aspect ratio of the image.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Icon size
PropertyTypes.Description: The size of the icon in pixels.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Responsive
PropertyTypes.Description: Image will never get larger than its original size. It can become smaller.

type.WidgetDescription: Display an image and enlarge it on click.
